default: Tip: Explore side paths to find hidden rewards.
Tip: Use parkour to bypass direct fights.
Tip: Save often before entering dangerous zones.
Tip: Block and dodge to keep combo momentum.
world: Tip: The dwarven city of Sharuan hides ancient secrets. Look carefully.
Tip: Use your arcane magic to strike multiple foes.
Tip: Potions can be crafted in the wilderness.
Tip: Giant bosses telegraph their heavy attacks. Watch their shoulders!
